arts.ttl: Team News: Liverpool vs. Leicester City injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Premier League clash between Liverpool and Leicester City.

arts.ttl: The Man United legend who once had an interview to become Liverpool's manager but has since been sacked by a club in League Two
arts.sum: Liverpool have an incredible track record of hiring incredible manager after incredible manager. From Bill Shankly to Bob Paisley to Joe Fagan to Gerard Houllier...

arts.ttl: These are the 25 best players to feature for Liverpool in the Premier League and you're not going to like it
arts.sum: The ECHO has determined the best players to turn out for Liverpool in the last 32-and-a-bit years - and you're not going to be happy

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah shares sweet Christmas photo with family as Liverpool star flooded with comments
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has posted an image with his family at Christmas as the Liverpool star prepares for a crucial second half of the season amid an ongoing contract standoff

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. Leicester City: Arne Slot should win Premier League fixture, take advantage in title race
arts.sum: Liverpool head into their clash against Leicester City at Anfield in the Premier League on Boxing Day as clear favourites, and should emerge as comfortable victors.

arts.ttl: Liverpool youngsters who could save Reds millions in the transfer market in 2025
arts.sum: The Reds’ academy continues to produce players for the senior team

arts.ttl: Meet the real Arne Slot: LEWIS STEELE reveals how flying Dutchman fell in love with Liverpool, what's changed from Jurgen Klopp era and his surprising matchday superstition
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE: There are two scenes which perfectly paint the picture of how Arne Slot is slowly falling in love with Liverpool and how the Kop has grown to adore this low-key, smooth operator.

arts.ttl: Liverpool predicted lineup vs Leicester - Premier League
arts.sum: How Liverpool could line up for their Premier League clash with Leicester on Boxing Day.

arts.ttl: Leicester City transfer state of play as priority becomes clear amid doubts over striker link
arts.sum: While van Nistelrooy has publicly said that he’s more than content with his current four centre-back options, the heart of the defence is expected to be a focus for City next month. City are only permitted to have two players on loan from fellow Premier League clubs at any one time, so it feels like a waste of one of those spots if the man filling it can’t even make the bench.

arts.ttl: Seventeen players you forgot captained Liverpool
arts.sum: After Wataru Endo captained Liverpool in the second half against Southampton last week, a look back at some of the Reds you forgot wore the armband in years gone by
